# Bernard On The Aux

> A personal, passion-driven music review and listening log. Album reviews, gig diaries, deep dives, playlists, and listening notes — built on slow listening.

## About

Bernard On The Aux is a music blog by Bernard that prioritizes listening, context, and memory over speed, hype, or blanket coverage. Reviews lean toward records that reward full attention — albums that unfold over time. The writing focuses on what a record sounds like, how it sits in a listening session, and why it might be worth your time.

## Content Types

- **Album Reviews**: Full-album listening sessions with ratings (0–10), format info (Vinyl, CD, Digital, Stream, Cassette), standout tracks, and critical notes. Found at /reviews/
- **Gig Diaries**: Concert and live show notes for shows actually attended — the room, the set, the memory. Found at /gigs/
- **Deep Dives**: Longer reads on artists, genres, and eras that deserve a slower pace. Found at /deep-dives/
- **Playlists**: Curated sequences tied to posts, themes, or moods across Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, Tidal, and Bandcamp. Found at /playlists/
- **Listening Notes**: Quick observations when a moment deserves saving. Found at /notes/

## Key Pages

- Home: https://bernardontheaux.com/
- All Reviews: https://bernardontheaux.com/reviews/
- All Gigs: https://bernardontheaux.com/gigs/
- Deep Dives: https://bernardontheaux.com/deep-dives/
- Playlists: https://bernardontheaux.com/playlists/
- Listening Notes: https://bernardontheaux.com/notes/

- Tags: https://bernardontheaux.com/tags/
- Search: https://bernardontheaux.com/search/
- About: https://bernardontheaux.com/about/
- Contact: https://bernardontheaux.com/contact/
- RSS Feed: https://bernardontheaux.com/rss.xml
- Full Content Index: https://bernardontheaux.com/llms-full.txt

## Structured Data

This site provides schema.org structured data (JSON-LD) including:
- MusicAlbum with Review and Rating for album reviews
- MusicEvent for gig diaries
- MusicPlaylist for curated playlists
- BlogPosting for all article content
- BreadcrumbList for navigation
- WebSite with SearchAction

## Feeds & Machine-Readable Endpoints

- RSS: https://bernardontheaux.com/rss.xml
- Sitemap: https://bernardontheaux.com/sitemap-index.xml
- Search Index (JSON): https://bernardontheaux.com/search-index.json
- Full Content Index: https://bernardontheaux.com/llms-full.txt
